headline: Walmart Tests Subway Delivery To Deepen App Engagement And Order Frequency
summary: Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT) is adding Subway restaurant orders to its Express Delivery service, its first integration of a restaurant partner. Customers in select states can now order Subway meals within the Walmart app and website, alongside regular Walmart items, for rapid delivery. The rollout is set to target 1,400 locations by late summer, expanding the scope of Walmart's rapid delivery offering. For you as an investor, this move shows Walmart extending its Express Delivery model beyond...
